title: Build-once artifact result
evidenceClass: Observed at the exact one-local-run scope

steps.identityOrBoundary: fixed source and lockfile recorded; canonical artifact SHA-256 emitted
digest recomputed in a separate verification directory
handoff, verification, and deployment artifact bytes are identical

limitations: Digest and local provenance establish byte identity and recorded inputs, not semantic harmlessness.
The unsigned local receipt does not establish authenticity if artifact and receipt are replaced together.
The empty child environment and fixed code path are not OS-level egress enforcement evidence; cross-machine reproducibility is unmeasured.
